creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Thanks,

Please use the following style:

BUILD_DEPENDS=	...
RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

or:

RUN_DEPENDS=	...
BUILD_DEPENDS=	${RUN_DEPENDS}

On Fri, May 16, 2008 at 06:40:03PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/php-Net_Gearman,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/123739 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123739
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
* Gea-Suan Lin                                    http://blog.gslin.org/
* If you cannot convince them, confuse them.           -- Harry S Truman
